/* * Text diff implementation. * * This library supports the following APIs: * Diff.diffChars: Character by character diff * Diff.diffWords: Word (as defined by \b regex) diff which ignores whitespace * Diff.diffLines: Line based diff * * Diff.diffCss: Diff targeted at CSS content * * These methods are based on the implementation proposed in * "An O(ND) Difference Algorithm and its Variations" (Myers, 1986). * http://citeseerx.ist.psu.edu/viewdoc/summary?doi=10.1.1.4.6927 */ var base_js_1 = require("./diff/base.js");
